scenario.name: First review fails on atomicity; retry passes after narrowing scope

final_local.goal: Document trace inspection — the .mermaid file format, how to read node colours, and how to debug a stuck execution from the trace alone.
final_local.intent: type: reference + how-to; scope: one page; audience: integrator.
final_local.draft: # Inspecting executions (attempt 2: scope narrowed to .mermaid file format only — debugging split into separate page per review notes)
